title: Sleep Boost
desc: Skip expensive processing while the player sleeps.

name: SLEEP_SKIP_VEH
tooltip: Turns off vehicle movement and autodrive while sleeping

name: SLEEP_SKIP_SOUND
tooltip: Sounds are not processed while sleeping

name: SLEEP_SKIP_MON
tooltip: Monsters do not move while the player is sleeping

name: SLEEP_SKIP_NPC
tooltip: NPCs are forced to sleep alongside the player, skipping movement but still processing rest recovery (fatigue reduction, healing, etc.).  NPCs with non-interruptible activities (e.g. surgery) are frozen for the turn instead.

name: LOAD_FROM_EXTERNAL
tooltip: Save in data/catalcysm... instead of Documents/...

title: Monster LOD
desc: Configure level-of-detail thresholds for monster AI.

name: MONSTER_LOD_ENABLED
tooltip: Enable level-of-detail processing for monsters.  When enabled, distant or wandering monsters are assigned reduced-fidelity AI tiers (coarse path reuse or a simple macro step) to save CPU.  When disabled, every monster runs full AI every turn regardless of distance.

name: LOD_ACTION_BUDGET
tooltip: Minimum number of monsters that enter the move loop per turn.  The actual budget is the larger of this value and the current Tier-0 (full-AI) monster count, so full-AI monsters are never skipped.  Higher values process more distant monsters each turn at a CPU cost.  0 means only Tier-0 monsters run (no extra Tier-1 budget).

name: LOD_MACRO_INTERVAL
tooltip: How many turns elapse between movement steps for Tier-2 (distant wandering) monsters.  At 1 they step every turn; at 3 (default) they step once every 3 turns.  Higher values reduce CPU cost for distant hordes.

name: LOD_TIER_FULL_DIST
tooltip: Chebyshev distance threshold for full-AI (Tier 0) monsters.  Monsters within this radius run the complete AI every turn.  Must be less than the Coarse AI Radius.

name: LOD_TIER_COARSE_DIST
tooltip: Chebyshev distance threshold for coarse-AI (Tier 1) monsters.  Monsters between the Full AI Radius and this distance use cached paths and skip expensive faction queries.  Monsters beyond this distance are Tier-2 (macro step only).

name: LOD_DEMOTION_COOLDOWN
tooltip: Turns a monster must wait after being promoted to a higher-fidelity tier before it can be demoted again.  Prevents rapid tier oscillation at distance boundaries.  0 disables the cooldown.

name: LOD_COARSE_SCENT_INTERVAL
tooltip: How many turns elapse between scent-tracking checks for Tier-1 (coarse) monsters.  At 1 they check scent every turn (full fidelity); at 3 (default) only once every 3 turns.  Higher values reduce CPU cost for mid-range hordes.

name: LOD_GROUP_MORALE_MAX_TIER
tooltip: Highest LOD tier that participates in group-morale and swarming calculations.  0 = Tier-0 only (default, cheapest).  1 = Tier-0 and Tier-1 monsters also run group-morale/swarm checks at the cost of the extra O(M²) faction scan for mid-range monsters.

name: FOV_3D
tooltip: If false, vision is limited to current z-level.  If true and the world is in z-level mode, the vision will extend beyond current z-level.

name: FOV_3D_Z_RANGE
menu_text: Vertical range of 3D field of vision
tooltip: How many levels up and down the experimental 3D field of vision reaches.  (This many levels up, this many levels down.)  3D vision of the full height of the world can slow the game down a lot.  Seeing fewer Z-levels is faster.

name: FOV_3D_OCCLUSION
tooltip: When enabled, obstacles at other z-levels correctly block horizontal line of sight.  Requires 3D FoV.  Slower than disabled.

name: SKEW_VISION_CACHE_SIZE
tooltip: Maximum number of line-of-sight results kept in the skew-vision LRU cache.  Higher values reduce redundant ray traces at the cost of more RAM.  Reduce if memory is tight; increase on machines with spare RAM and many on-screen creatures.

title: Multithreading
desc: Configure worker-thread parallelism for expensive per-turn computations.

name: MULTITHREADING_ENABLED
tooltip: Enable worker-thread parallelism for expensive per-turn computations (monster planning, map-cache building, scent map updates).  Disable to run everything on the main thread.  Requires restart.

name: THREAD_POOL_WORKERS
tooltip: Number of worker threads in the persistent thread pool.  0 means automatic (hardware concurrency minus 1, leaving one core for the main thread).  Requires restart.

name: PARALLEL_MONSTER_PLANNING
tooltip: Compute monster AI plans in parallel across worker threads each turn.  Requires restart.

name: MONSTER_PLAN_CHUNK_SIZE
tooltip: Number of monsters batched into a single worker-thread task during the parallel planning pass.  Requires restart.

name: PARALLEL_MAP_CACHE
tooltip: Build per-z-level map caches in parallel across worker threads.  Requires restart.

name: PARALLEL_SCENT_UPDATE
tooltip: Compute the scent-diffusion passes across worker threads.  Requires restart.

name: LAZY_BORDER
tooltip: Keep a border of submaps loaded around the reality bubble.  Uses more memory but reduces stalls when the map scrolls.

title: Reality Bubble
desc: Configure how submaps are loaded and processed.

name: REALITY_BUBBLE_TICK_INTERVAL
tooltip: How many turns elapse between out-of-bubble world ticks.

name: REALITY_BUBBLE_FIRE_SPREAD
tooltip: Controls whether fire in loaded submaps can spread into adjacent unloaded submaps.

name: FIRE_SPREAD_SUBMAP_CAP
tooltip: Maximum number of submaps that fire spread may keep loaded simultaneously across all dimensions.

name: REALITY_BUBBLE_SIZE
tooltip: Submap radius of the reality bubble.  REQUIRES A GAME RESTART to take effect.

name: ACTIVITY_MOBILE_BUBBLE_SIZE
tooltip: Shrink the reality bubble to this radius while the player is performing a mobile activity (crafting, construction, etc.).  0 disables the feature.  Must be smaller than Reality Bubble Size to take effect.

name: ACTIVITY_IDLE_BUBBLE_SIZE
tooltip: Shrink the reality bubble to this radius while the player is performing an idle activity (sleeping, reading, waiting, etc.).  0 disables the feature.  Must be smaller than Reality Bubble Size to take effect.

name: UNDERGROUND_BUBBLE_SIZE
tooltip: Shrink the reality bubble to this radius while the player is underground and indoors (no sky visible).  0 disables the feature.  Must be smaller than Reality Bubble Size to take effect.

name: VEHICLE_BUBBLE_SIZE
tooltip: Shrink the reality bubble to this radius while the player is actively driving a vehicle or mounted on a creature.  0 disables the feature.  Must be smaller than Reality Bubble Size to take effect.

name: COMBAT_BUBBLE_SIZE
tooltip: Shrink the reality bubble to this radius while hostile creatures are visible nearby.  Uses the same detection range as safe mode.  0 disables the feature.  Must be smaller than Reality Bubble Size to take effect.

name: ACTIVITY_BUBBLE_GRACE
tooltip: Minimum length of activity in minutes before the reality bubble shrinks.  Acts as a safety net to avoid unnecessary resizes for short tasks.  Default is 5 minutes.

name: DYNAMIC_BUBBLE_GRACE
tooltip: Consecutive turns a condition must be met before the reality bubble shrinks for underground, vehicle, and combat modes.  Prevents rapid resizing when briefly entering or leaving a trigger zone.  Default is 5 turns.

name: POWER_PORTAL_LOAD_RADIUS
tooltip: Radius in submaps around each end of a power-portal link that is force-loaded while the link is active.
